prompt: Phase 11 is ready for work item `2026-04-23-add-retry-mechanism` on parent issue `#42`. Show the required commit message shape that coding-task-workflow expects, including any trailer formatting rules.
assertions: Includes a body that references the work-item slug or parent issue `#42`
Makes clear that the Co-authored-by trailer block is separated from the preceding body by a blank line
expected_output: Shows a conventional-commits message with a body that links the work-item slug and parent issue, followed by a blank-line-separated Co-authored-by trailer using Copilot's known identity.
